item.title: Hojeong Kim, Selim An, Jaewoo Gwak, Sehyeon Park, Minsang Kim joined CELL
item.dc:creator: CELL
item.description: Hojeong Kim, Selim An, Jaewoo Gwak, Sehyeon Park , Minsang Kim joined CELL in the first semester of 2025. Welcome!
item.content:encoded: Hojeong Kim, Selim An, Jaewoo Gwak, Sehyeon Park , Minsang Kim joined CELL in the first semester of 2025. Welcome!

item.title: Chaitali Bhattacharyya joined CELL

item.description: Chaitali Bhattacharyya in the AI department joined CELL in the second semester of 2024. Welcome!
item.content:encoded: Chaitali Bhattacharyya in the AI department joined CELL in the second semester of 2024. Welcome!

item.description: Junyeong Lee in the EECS department, Shinhyoung Jang, Seonha Ryu in the AI department joined CELL in the first semester of 2024. Welcome!

item.title: Seohyun Kim, Kangwon Kim joined CELL

item.description: Seohyun Kim, Kangwon Kim in the AI department joined CELL in the first semester of 2023. Welcome!
